name: Volcano Solid Valve Wear & Tear Set
summary: Volcano Solid Valve Wear & Tear Set — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Solid Valve Wear & Tear Set provides all the necessary components for replacing worn parts in your Volcano Classic or Volcano Digital Vaporiser's Solid Valve. It is compatible with both versions of the Solid Valve. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
